nodes.norm_label: tek cagrıda hem anlık fiyat hem gun acılısı.

nodes.label: Tek çağrıda hem price hem open — bot bunu kullanır.
nodes.norm_label: tek cagrıda hem price hem open — bot bunu kullanır.

nodes.label: T212 key'lerini RAM'e al ve bot'u bağla. İlk bağlantıda UI şifresini ayarla.
nodes.norm_label: t212 key'lerini ram'e al ve bot'u bagla. ilk baglantıda ui sifresini ayarla.

nodes.label: Return the T212 ticker string for a given symbol, or None if not found.
nodes.norm_label: return the t212 ticker string for a given symbol, or none if not found.

nodes.label: Bilingual Log Design (tr/en)
nodes.rationale: LogEntry carries both tr and en fields so the frontend can switch language without refetching. Language switching re-renders existing DOM elements using data-tr/data-en attributes.

nodes.label: T212 Keys in RAM Only Design
nodes.rationale: T212 API keys are stored only in RAM (_t212_key, _t212_secret), never written to disk. On server restart they must be re-entered. Browser localStorage auto-fills them on reconnect. Only the PBKDF2 hash of the UI password is persisted in config.json.
nodes.norm_label: t212 keys in ram only design

nodes.label: Rate-Limit Auto Retry
nodes.rationale: On HTTP 429, _request reads x-ratelimit-reset header and sleeps that many seconds before retrying recursively. Prevents flooding T212 API on rate limits.

nodes.label: 15-min Tick Strategy Flow
nodes.rationale: Each tick: bot._tick() → _process_stock() per enabled ticker → PriceFeed.get_quote() (price + open in one API call) → buy/sell logic → t212_client.place_market_order() → save_state(). 5-minute loop interval.

nodes.label: State Persistence via state.json
nodes.rationale: bot.save_state() writes to STATE_FILE (state.json). DATA_DIR env var redirects to /data on Fly.io mounted volume. load_state() called once at startup. Default stocks (ASTI, POET) added only when state file has no stocks.
